svg.title: RankRush Exam Portal DFD and ERD
svg.desc: Clean pictorial representation of the RankRush Exam Portal with a context DFD, a level-1 DFD, and an ERD.
svg.text: Clean pictorial view of the project-wide DFD and ERD
External actors and the overall system boundary
Django web application for students, faculty, and admin
admin panels, support records, proctor settings
activation email, login alerts, cheat notifications
Main processes, data stores, and major data exchanges across the project
render exam, accept answers, score attempt
The level-1 DFD groups related stores to keep the picture readable and non-overlapping
Principal models and their main relationships across identity, exam authoring, attempts, and monitoring
app-level one result container per student
The ERD keeps only principal models visible and abstracts Django join tables to keep the picture clear
